# nxt-color-picker documentation

> Color picker widget for Angular

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-10T19:50:11.726Z, llm-md export.

## Directives

### ColorPickerDirective

File: `src/lib/color-picker.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtColor]`

Inputs:
- `nxtColor: string | undefined = undefined` — The color to show in the color picker dialog
- `alphaChannel: AlphaChannel = AlphaChannelEnum.enabled` — Alpha channel mode
- `cancelButton: boolean = false` — Show a Cancel / Reset button which resets the color
- `closeClickOutside: boolean = true` — Close the color picker dialog when user clicks outside
- `cmykEnabled: boolean = false` — Enables CMYK input format and color change event
- `dialogDisplay: DialogDisplay = DialogDisplayEnum.popup` — Dialog positioning mode
- `disabled: boolean = false` — Disables opening of the color picker dialog via toggle
- `disableInput: boolean = false` — Disables / hides the color input field from the dialog
- `fallbackColor: string` — Used when the color is not well-formed or is undefined
- `height: string = 'auto'` — Use this option to force color picker dialog height
- `ignoredElements: any[]` — Array of HTML elements that will be ignored when clicked
- `maxPresetColors: number` — Use this option to set the max colors allowed in presets
- `mode: ColorMode = 'color'` — Dialog color mode
- `okButton: boolean = false` — Show an OK / Apply button which saves the color
- `outputFormat: OutputFormat = OutputFormatEnum.auto` — Output color format
- `position: DialogPosition | DialogPosition[] = DialogPositionEnum.auto` — Dialog position
- `positionOffset: number = 0` — Dialog offset percentage relative to the directive element
- `presetColors: string[]` — Array of preset colors to show in the color picker dialog
- `presetColorsEditable: boolean = false` — Show buttons to add / remove preset colors
- `presetLabel: boolean | string = true` — Show label for preset colors If string is given, it overrides the default label.
- `saveClickOutside: boolean = true` — Save currently selected color when user clicks outside
- `toggle: boolean = false` — Sets the default open / close state of the color picker
- `useRootViewContainer: boolean = false` — Create dialog component in the root view container Note: The root component needs to have public viewContainerRef.
- `width: string = '230px'` — Use this option to set color picker dialog width

Outputs:
- `close: string | undefined` — Current color value, emit when dialog is closed
- `cmykColorChange: string` — Outputs the color as CMYK string if CMYK is enabled
- `colorSelect: string` — Color select canceled, emit when Cancel button is pressed
- `colorSelectCancel: void` — Selected color value, emit when OK button pressed or user clicks outside (if saveClickOutside is true)
- `inputChange: InputChangeEvent` — Input name and its value, emit when user changes color through inputs
- `nxtColorChange: string` — Changed color value, emit when color changes
- `open: string | undefined` — Current color value, emit when dialog is isOpen
- `presetColorsChange: string[]` — Preset colors, emit when preset color is added / removed
- `sliderChange: SliderChangeEvent` — Slider name and its value, emit when user changes color through slider
- `sliderDragEnd: SliderChangeEvent` — Slider name and current color, emit when slider dragging ends
- `sliderDragStart: SliderChangeEvent` — Slider name and current color, emit when slider dragging starts
- `toggleChange: boolean` — Status of the dialog, emit when dialog is isOpen / closed

Properties:
- `nxtColor: unknown = linkedSignal({ source: () => this._nxtColor(), computation: v => v })`

Methods:
- `closeDialog(): void`
- `openDialog(): void`
- `textColorMode(bg: string | Rgba = new Rgba(1, 1, 1, 1, true), fg: unknown = this.dialog?.rgbaText): "light" | "dark"` — Get text color mode to ensure good contrast with selected color

## Classes

### Cmyk

File: `src/util/formats.ts`

Properties:
- `a: number`
- `c: number`
- `k: number`
- `m: number`
- `y: number`

### Hsla

File: `src/util/formats.ts`

Properties:
- `a: number`
- `h: number`
- `l: number`
- `s: number`

### Hsva

File: `src/util/formats.ts`

Properties:
- `a: number`
- `h: number`
- `s: number`
- `v: number`

### Rgba

File: `src/util/formats.ts`

Properties:
- `a: number`
- `b: number`
- `g: number`
- `r: number`

## Interfaces

### InputChangeEvent

File: `src/util/types.ts`

Properties:
- `color: string`
- `input: string`
- `valid: boolean`
- `value: number | string`

### SliderChangeEvent

File: `src/util/types.ts`

Properties:
- `color: string`
- `slider: string`
- `value?: number | string`

## Public functions

- `calculateContrast(foreground: Rgba, background: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `calculateLuminance(color: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `calculateMinimumAlpha(foreground: Rgba, background: Rgba, minContrastRatio: number)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `clamp(val: number, min: number, max: number)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `cmykToRgb(cmyk: Cmyk): Rgba`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `compositeAlpha(foregroundAlpha: number, backgroundAlpha: number)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `compositeColors(foreground: Rgba, background: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `compositeComponent(fgC: number, fgA: number, bgC: number, bgA: number, a: number)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `denormalizeCMYK(cmyk: Cmyk): Cmyk`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `denormalizeHSLA(hsla: Hsla)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `denormalizeHSVA(hsva: Hsva)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `denormalizeRGBA(rgba: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `formatCmyk(cmyk: Cmyk, alphaChannel: AlphaChannel)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `formatOutput(hsva: Hsva, outputFormat: OutputFormat, alphaChannel?: AlphaChannel)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `hslaToHsva(hsla: Hsla)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `hsvaToHsla(hsva: Hsva)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `hsvaToRgba(hsva: Hsva)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `normalizeCMYK(cmyk: Cmyk): Cmyk`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `normalizeHSLA(hsla: Hsla)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `normalizeHSVA(hsva: Hsva)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `normalizeRGBA(rgba: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `rgbaToCmyk(rgba: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `rgbaToHex(rgba: Rgba, allowHex8?: boolean)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `rgbaToHsva(rgba: Rgba)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `stringToCmyk(colorString: string = '', allowHex8: boolean = false)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`
- `stringToHsva(colorString: string = '', allowHex8: boolean = false)`
  Defined in `src/util/color.ts`

## Public type aliases

- `` type AlphaChannel = `${AlphaChannelEnum}` ``
- `` type ColorFormat = `${ColorFormatEnum}` ``
- `type ColorMode = "color" | "c" | "1" | "grayscale" | "g" | "2" | "presets" | "p" | "3"`
- `` type DialogDisplay = `${DialogDisplayEnum}` ``
- `` type DialogPosition = `${DialogPositionEnum}` ``
- `` type OutputFormat = `${OutputFormatEnum}` ``

## Public enumerations

- `enum AlphaChannelEnum`
  - `enabled = enabled`
  - `disabled = disabled`
  - `always = always`
  - `forced = forced`

- `enum ColorFormatEnum`
  - `hex = hex`
  - `rgba = rgba`
  - `hsla = hsla`
  - `cmyk = cmyk`

- `enum DialogDisplayEnum`
  - `popup = popup`
  - `inline = inline`

- `enum DialogPositionEnum`
  - `auto = auto`
  - `top = top`
  - `left = left`
  - `right = right`
  - `bottom = bottom`

- `enum OutputFormatEnum`
  - `auto = auto`
  - `hex = hex`
  - `rgba = rgba`
  - `hsla = hsla`

## Public variables

- `AlphaEnabledFormats: unknown = new Set<ColorFormat>([ColorFormatEnum.hsla, ColorFormatEnum.rgba, ColorFormatEnum.cmyk])`
  Defined in `src/util/types.ts`
